pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version properties from 1.8 to 11 to align with the target JDK.
Add explicit JAXB runtime dependency because it was removed from the JDK standard library in Java 11.
Add explicit javax.annotation-api dependency because java.annotation packages were removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 1.2.0.RELEASE to 2.3.7.RELEASE to support Java 11 and modernize the framework stack.
Upgrade Hibernate from 4.3.6.Final to 5.4.25.Final to align with Spring Boot 2.x and Java 11 compatibility.
Upgrade Liquibase from 3.3.2 to 4.2.2 to ensure compatibility with newer Hibernate and Java versions.
Replace Joda-Time dependencies with Java 8+ java.time (JSR-310) support, as Joda-Time is deprecated and unnecessary in modern Java.
Switch Jackson Hibernate module from version 4 to version 5 to match the upgraded Hibernate version.
Replace legacy swagger-springmvc with Springfox to support OpenAPI 3.0 and modern Spring Boot versions.
Switch from Hibernate Ehcache integration to Hibernate JCache (JSR-107) to align with modern Spring Boot caching abstractions.
Add MapStruct dependencies for type-safe bean mapping, a standard practice in modern JHipster applications.
Add the JHipster Framework dependency to utilize shared utilities and configurations provided by the JHipster ecosystem.
Add Testcontainers for MySQL to enable robust integration testing with real database instances.
Change project packaging from WAR to JAR to align with the standard executable JAR format of modern Spring Boot applications.
Update Maven plugin versions (compiler, surefire, etc.) to versions compatible with Java 11 and modern build standards.
Introduce JHipster Dependencies BOM to centralize and manage transitive dependency versions.
Add Spring Boot Thymeleaf starter for server-side rendering support.
Add Spring Boot Web starter for web application support.
Exclude JUnit Vintage engine from Spring Boot Test to enforce JUnit 5 usage.
Add Spring Boot Test dependency for testing utilities.
Add Spring Security Test dependency for security testing.
Add ArchUnit JUnit 5 API for architectural testing.
Add ArchUnit JUnit 5 Engine for architectural testing execution.
Add Zalando Problem Spring Web for standardized error responses.
Add JJWT API for JSON Web Token handling.
Add JJWT Implementation for JSON Web Token handling.
Add JJWT Jackson module for JSON serialization.
Add Spring Security Data for security domain object support.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry for metrics export.
Add Dropwizard Metrics Core for metrics collection.
Remove Spring Cloud Cloud Foundry connector as it is deprecated/unused.
Remove Spring Cloud Spring Service connector as it is deprecated/unused.
Remove Spring Cloud Local Config connector as it is deprecated/unused.
Remove Spark Metrics Reporter as it is replaced by Micrometer.
Configure Maven Compiler Plugin with Java 11 source/target and annotation processors.
Configure Maven Enforcer Plugin to require Java 8-15 and specific Maven version.
Add Jib Maven Plugin for container image building without Docker daemon.
Update Liquibase plugin to use Hibernate 5 and Spring Boot 2 dependencies.
Add JaCoCo Maven Plugin for code coverage reporting.
Add Checkstyle Maven Plugin for code style enforcement.
Add Failsafe Maven Plugin for integration test execution.
Add Git Commit ID Plugin to generate git properties.
Add Properties Maven Plugin to read sonar-project.properties.
Configure Surefire Plugin to exclude integration tests and set report directory.
Configure Failsafe Plugin to include integration tests and set report directory.
Configure Spring Boot Maven Plugin to repackage and set main class.
Configure Resources Plugin to filter YAML config files.
Configure WAR Plugin to include static resources and disable web.xml requirement.
Remove SortPom plugin as it is no longer needed.
Remove Eclipse Lifecycle Mapping plugin configuration.
Switch the embedded web server from Tomcat to Undertow to align with JHipster 6.x defaults and improve performance.
pom.xml.human_impl: Replaced 'spring-boot-starter-tomcat' with 'spring-boot-starter-undertow' in dev, prod, and eclipse profiles.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy Yeoman/Grunt build process with Webpack managed by the frontend-maven-plugin to support modern frontend tooling.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed 'yeoman-maven-plugin' and added 'frontend-maven-plugin' executions for node/npm install and webpack builds.

pom.xml.general_idea: Enable Spring Boot DevTools in the development profile to support faster restarts and live reload during development.
Generate Spring Boot Actuator build information during the Maven build process for production monitoring.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added 'build-info' goal execution to 'spring-boot-maven-plugin' in the 'prod' profile.

pom.xml.general_idea: Include Git commit details in the application properties for better traceability in production.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added 'git-commit-id-plugin' to the 'prod' profile build plugins.

pom.xml.general_idea: Provide a dedicated Maven profile to package the application as a WAR file for deployment to external servlet containers.
Configure dependencies required for IDE-based annotation processing, specifically for MapStruct and Hibernate Metamodel generation.
Configure Maven lifecycle mappings to suppress warnings in Eclipse IDE regarding plugin executions that are not supported by m2e.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added 'eclipse' profile with 'lifecycle-mapping' plugin configuration to ignore jacoco and frontend-maven-plugin executions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Create a specific build profile for End-to-End testing that ensures the application is repackaged correctly.
Restructure Maven profiles to separate concerns (dev, prod, webpack, tls, api-docs) and manage Spring active profiles via properties.
pom.xml.human_impl: Renamed 'fast' to 'api-docs', added 'webpack', 'tls', 'no-liquibase' profiles, and updated 'spring.profiles.active' properties.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven clean plugin configuration to remove the new static resource directory structure used by Webpack.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Reorganize .editorconfig to group file-specific overrides and update glob patterns for modern web development file types.
.editorconfig.human_impl: Moved indent settings to specific globs like [*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,css,scss,yml,html}] and removed obsolete {package,bower}.json rule.

.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes configuration with a comprehensive community-standard template to handle line endings and binary detection for a wider variety of file types.
.gitattributes.human_impl: Replaced simple `* text eol=lf` and specific extensions with a detailed list including `* text=auto`, specific CRLF/LF rules for scripts, and extensive binary definitions for media, fonts, and archives.

.gitignore.general_idea: Replace minimal custom .gitignore with a comprehensive, categorized template to cover IDEs, build tools, and OS artifacts.
.gitignore.human_impl: Replaced 15 lines of specific ignores with a 148-line structured file containing sections for Node, Eclipse, IntelliJ, Maven, Gradle, etc.

.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Update the JHipster generator version to 7.0.0-beta.0 to align with Java 11 support.
Change the application package name to the standard JHipster sample namespace.
Rename the base application name to jhipsterSampleApplication.
Switch authentication mechanism from cookie-based to JWT.
Migrate frontend builder from Grunt to AngularX with npm.
Add Gatling and Protractor to the test frameworks configuration.
Explicitly set the cache provider to ehcache with Hibernate cache enabled.
Define the initial set of entities for the sample application.
Normalize boolean configuration values to strict JSON booleans.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the generic placeholder README with the standard JHipster 7.0.0-beta.0 documentation template.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'README for jhipster' with detailed sections on Development, PWA, Dependencies, Angular CLI, Production, Testing, Docker, and CI.

package.json.general_idea: Update the required Node.js version to 14.15.0 to align with modern tooling and JDK 11 era build environments.
Replace the legacy Grunt/Bower/AngularJS stack with a modern Angular 11 and Webpack build pipeline.
package.json.human_impl: Removed grunt, bower, karma; Added @angular/core, webpack, @angular/cli

package.json.general_idea: Switch frontend testing from Karma/Jasmine to Jest for better performance and modern Angular integration.
Replace JSHint with ESLint and Prettier for standardized code formatting and linting.
Update end-to-end testing tools to Protractor 7 and Selenium WebDriver 4 compatible versions.
Upgrade the JHipster generator dependency to version 7.0.0-beta.0 to support the new project structure.
Add comprehensive npm scripts for CI/CD pipelines including backend testing, e2e preparation, and docker management.
package.json.human_impl: Added scripts like ci:backend:test, ci:e2e:prepare, docker:db:up

package.json.general_idea: Update package metadata including name, version, and license to reflect the new application identity.

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Rename the H2 database alias from 'JHipster H2 (Embedded)' to 'JHipster H2 (Memory)' to reflect the in-memory nature of the database.
Change the H2 in-memory database name from 'jhipster' to 'jhipstersampleapplication' to match the application context.
Set the H2 database user to 'jhipsterSampleApplication' instead of leaving it empty.
Enable remote access to the H2 web console by setting webAllowOthers to true.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the old ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner including ANSI color codes.
src/main/resources/banner.txt.human_impl: Replaced custom ASCII art with JHipster's standard colored banner template.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy BoneCP-style properties to standard HikariCP properties required by Spring Boot 2.x.
Replace the deprecated Hibernate H2 dialect with a custom fixed dialect to ensure compatibility with newer Hibernate versions.
Add Spring Boot DevTools configuration to enable automatic restart and exclude static resources from reloading.
Add Liquibase context configuration to enable loading of sample data in the development profile.
Introduce JHipster-specific configuration properties for cache, CORS, security, and mail settings.
Update logging configuration to use standard Spring Boot logging levels and add JHipster-specific logging options.
Refactor mail configuration to use standard Spring Boot properties and add JHipster-specific base URL.
Simplify Thymeleaf configuration by removing mode setting and keeping cache disabled for development.
Include the api-docs profile in the active profiles to enable Swagger documentation in development.
Explicitly disable the H2 console in the development profile configuration.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy MySQL JDBC driver properties to HikariCP standard properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Changed 'type' to 'com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource' and moved cache properties under 'hikari.data-source-properties'.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update JPA configuration to use modern Hibernate dialect and remove deprecated naming strategy.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed 'database-platform' and 'naming-strategy' properties, relying on auto-detection or newer defaults.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate cache configuration from root-level 'cache' properties to JHipster-specific 'jhipster.cache' namespace.
Replace legacy metrics exporters (Spark, Graphite) with Spring Boot Actuator Prometheus configuration.
Add JHipster-specific security and JWT configuration properties required for the new version.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added 'jhipster.security.authentication.jwt' block with base64-secret and validity settings.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Enable HTTP response compression in the server configuration for performance optimization.
Configure graceful shutdown for the Spring Boot application server.
Restructure logging configuration to use standard Spring Boot 'logging.level' properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Replaced custom logging settings with 'logging.level.ROOT: INFO' and package-specific levels.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Explicitly disable Spring Boot DevTools in the production profile to prevent accidental activation.
Move mail base URL configuration to the JHipster-specific namespace.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x management properties with Spring Boot 2.x Actuator configuration structure.
Update custom async thread pool configuration to use standard Spring Boot 2.x task execution properties.
Move mail configuration from custom root level to standard Spring Boot 2.x spring.mail namespace.
Update JPA and Hibernate properties to align with Spring Boot 2.x and Hibernate 5.3+ defaults.
Replace legacy Swagger 2.x configuration with Springdoc OpenAPI 3.x compatible properties.
Remove deprecated Spring Security 4.x basic auth and Jolokia endpoint settings.
Add standard Spring Boot 2.x server servlet session cookie security settings.
Configure application info and ribbon display profiles for development environments.
Define JHipster-specific client application properties and metadata.
Set standard Spring application name and profile activation placeholders.
